name: Practice Director
quote: For the first time we can see exactly which ads turn into booked patients, not just clicks. Hive Metric didn't just run our ads — they rebuilt how we think about growth.

name: Managing Partner
quote: We took on 30% more clients this year without hiring a single extra admin. The automation work paid for itself within the first month.

name: VP of Sales
quote: Every lead now gets followed up automatically. We stopped losing deals to slow response times, and I finally trust our pipeline numbers.

name: Head of Growth
quote: We finally make growth decisions from one number, not six conflicting spreadsheets. Hive Metric feels like an extension of our own team.
